items.title: coca_cola
items.ingredients: CARBONATED WATER, HIGH FRUCTOSE CORN SYRUP, CARAMEL COLOR, PHOSPHORIC ACID, NATURAL FLAVORS, CAFFEINE.

items.title: coca_cola_peach
items.ingredients: Carbonated water, coloring (E150d), acidity regulators (E338, E331), natural flavors (incl. caffeine), sweeteners (aspartame, acesulfame K). Contains a source of phenylalanine.

items.title: coca_cola_zero_sugar
items.ingredients: Carbonated water, color (Caramel E150d), acidity regulator (E338, E331), sweetener (aspartame, acesulfame K), natural flavors, aroma caffeine. Contains a source of phenylalanine.

items.title: sprite
items.ingredients: Dark, rich espresso lies in wait under a smoothed and stretched layer of thick milk foam. An alchemy of barista artistry and craft.

items.title: fanta_orange
items.ingredients: Dark, rich espresso lies in wait under a smoothed and stretched layer of thick milk foam. An alchemy of barista artistry and craft.

items.title: mezzo_mix
items.ingredients: Flavors of sweet pistachio and a brown-buttery topping paired with espresso and steamed milk, specially crafted to keep you comforted and energized.
